summary:
Operating results or guidance
Key size disclosed: ~$12.0B
Items filed: Item 2: 02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition; Item 2: 02 of Form 8-K, "Results of Operations and Financial Condition" and shall not be deemed "filed" for purposes of Section; Item 9: 01 Financial Statements and Exhibits
engineer: Read the exhibit for operational detail (contracts, launches, compute). 8-K body is often legal wrapper; Exhibit 99.1 carries the substance.
trader:
Map filing to next dated catalyst on the calendar before sizing risk.
Next dated supply/demand events on our calendar:
  • 2026-08-20: First major lock-up unlock (~7% pool; roughly doubles tradable float)
  • 2026-09-02: Goldman bridge $175.50 trigger window ends
  • 2026-12-08: Remainder lock-up release (180-day customary expiry)
cfa: Treat as corporate finance or governance signal until quantified in financials.
elon: Issuer filing: affects TSLA capital structure and governance, not necessarily Musk's personal sales today. Cross-check CIK 1494730 Form 4 stream for his moves.
supply_demand:
Demand vs supply (what actually moves the stock):
• Re-read for explicit share count, ATM, secondary, or lock-up language.
